_note: Label Sprint round for sperm — generated sperm_illus.webp, cropped/keyed dark mode.
caption: Tap each label, then tap where it belongs on the sperm cell.

hotspots.label: Head
hotspots.detail: Contains the nucleus with the highly condensed genetic material.

hotspots.label: Acrosome
hotspots.detail: A cap over the head's tip containing enzymes to penetrate the egg.

hotspots.label: Midpiece
hotspots.detail: Packed with spiral mitochondria that power the tail's movement.

hotspots.label: Tail (flagellum)
hotspots.detail: The long whip-like structure that propels the sperm forward.

generation_prompt: human sperm cell, 3D detail, side view
